title: rajania cyclophylla
intro: Rajania cyclophylla, also known as the Indian turnip or yellow turnip, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Tropaeolaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rajania cyclophylla include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat various skin conditions. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and powder forms, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
